lyrics:
The ancestors walked where the red stone stands
They learned of the bargain and the blood in the sand

A shaman knelt in the canyon below
Cut by cat's claw as the summer moon rose
He bargained for water, and plentiful corn
For thirteen long moons, the people reborn

But the river ran dry on the next summer night
The harvest turned bitter, the stars burned bright
They gathered the people, they followed the flood
Their memory vanished, the bargain draws blood

Cat's Claw… Take the crown, take the gold
Cat's Claw… Take the love you'll never hold
Hopeful, we make the bargain, tho the ending is set
What the desert gives, we will never forget

A man builds his fortune, a queen finds her king
A poet writes verses, the world starts to sing
But things turn to dust, and love fades to pain
And the songs we remember are lost in the rain

Cat's Claw… Take the crown, take the gold
Cat's Claw… Take the love you'll never hold
Hopeful, we make the bargain, tho the ending is set
What the desert gives, we will never forget

But still we reach, and still we run
Still we love beneath the sun
Each having has an ending
The bargain is pretending

Cat's Claw… Take the crown, take the gold
Cat's Claw… Take the love you'll never hold
Hopeful, we make the bargain, tho the ending is set
What the desert gives, we will never forget

The people walk where the red stone stands
We make the bargain, we lose our land
The claw hooks us like wind in the sand
The bargain is pretending
persona:
## 4Castle

The Future of Rock, The Power of Harmony

**4Castle **is a genre-defying, five-piece supergroup under Maricopa Records, built on a foundation of powerful vocal harmonies, intricate musicianship, and fearless innovation. Rooted in rock, but unbound by limitations, their music fuses elements of progressive rock, funk, Latin rhythms, blues, and folk, delivering a sound that is both technically complex and emotionally resonant.

### **A Band Like No Other**

Each member of **4Castle **brings a distinct voice-both musically and vocally-to the mix:
🎸 **Raven Cortez**(Lead Guitar, Vocals) – A fiery virtuoso with Latin and blues influences, weaving face-melting solos into every performance.
🎸 **Skylar “Sky” Monroe**(Rhythm Guitar, Vocals) – The poetic soul of the band, crafting melodic foundations and lyrically rich storytelling.
🎹 **Jonah Vega**(Keyboards, Vocals) – The sonic architect, layering psychedelic synths, Hammond organ swells, and cinematic orchestrations.
🎸 **Malcolm “Mack” Bishop**(Bass, Vocals) – The groove master, blending funk, jazz, and progressive rock into fluid, deep-pocket basslines.
🥁 **Eli “Fox” Foster **(Drums, Vocals) – The wild heartbeat, pushing the band forward with thunderous fills, polyrhythmic grooves, and explosive energy.

### **What Defines 4Castle?**

- **Multi-Layered Vocal Harmonies**– All five members **sing**, creating **rich, choral-like textures**that elevate every song.

- **Complex Arrangements & Bold Songwriting**– Each track is an **immersive journey**, balancing **technical mastery with raw emotion**.

- **Rhythmic Power & Innovation**– From **tight funk grooves to shifting time signatures**, their music **moves you-literally and figuratively**.

- **Lyrically Challenging Yet Accessible**– Their songs explore **deep themes of life, change, and resilience**, wrapped in **memorable hooks and melodies**.

### **4Castle’s Sound**

Imagine putting Emerson, Lake & Palmer, Heart, Led Zeppelin, Sly Stone, and Carlos Santana in a blender. The result? **4Castle**. Their music pays homage to the greats while pushing rock’s boundaries into the future.

### **Join the Journey**

With Maricopa Records, **4Castle **is set to redefine what a modern rock band can be. Expect genre-bending albums, electrifying performances, and music that resonates across generations.

🚀 Follow **4Castle **as they build their legacy-one song, one harmony, and one unforgettable moment at a time.

[](https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Cmxf7xuTHzf7UahMK2xJh)[](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/4castle/1801052673)![](https://www.maricoparecords.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/5-rooks-in-a-dark-setting-1.png)
## Releases

impression.text: This track unfolds with a sparse and melancholic texture, built around an intimate female vocal and acoustic guitar that together create a mysterious, storytelling atmosphere. The energy is highly dynamic, starting as a gentle folk ballad before building into a powerful, driving rock feel in the choruses with the addition of full drums and sweeping strings. The production is clean and spacious, allowing the intimate vocal to remain clear and present while the layered instrumentation creates a wide, cinematic soundscape without feeling dense. A defining quality is the stark contrast between the contemplative verses and the explosive, almost anthemic chorus, where the emotional intensity and instrumental force peak in a memorable, dramatic release.

review.review_text: Built around a Southwestern legend of a shaman's bargain gone wrong, 'Cat's Claw' earns its ambition: the verses settle into a spare, intimate folk-rock feel before the chorus opens up at a brisk 152 BPM into something close to classic rock anthemic, the kind of lift that calls to mind early Heart at their most declarative. The lyric does real work, threading the ancient story into something universal with 'hopeful, we make the bargain, tho the ending is set,' and the band's five-part harmony is exactly the right vehicle for that fatalism. A highlight.
anchors_used: sparse verse to anthemic chorus structure
lyric quote: 'hopeful, we make the bargain, tho the ending is set'
